packages.name: @aperture-engine/app
packages.description: Aperture metaframework app facade, config helpers, and worker-safe system authoring API.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/simulation
packages.description: Headless ECS, assets, math, diagnostics, and transform foundation for Aperture.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/render
packages.description: Renderer-independent ECS authoring, assets, extraction, snapshots, and render-world contracts for Aperture.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/webgpu
packages.description: WebGPU rendering backend for the Aperture game engine: materials, shadows, IBL, post effects, picking, text, UI, and particles.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/runtime
packages.description: Headless simulation and render extraction runtime facade for Aperture.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/physics
packages.description: Backend-neutral physics components, fixed-step scheduling, and backend contracts for Aperture.

packages.name: @aperture-engine/vite-plugin
packages.description: Vite integration for Aperture config, worker system discovery, and generated browser bootstrap.
